visual: Rises from the previous posture into a bow stance with one hand raised above the head like a fan and the other pushing forward at shoulder height.
motion_description: From an initially raised arm position, the figure bends both knees to lower the center of gravity before stepping forward with the left foot. As the weight shifts forward into a left bow stance, the torso rotates slightly to the left. The right arm sweeps upward and across, rising above the head with the palm oriented forward, as the left arm pushes steadily forward at shoulder level. The slow, continuous motion finishes with a deliberate pause holding the extended, asymmetric arm posture.
